hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qE 'git push.*(origin )?(main|master)'; then echo '[Hook] BLOCKED: Never push directly to main/master. Open a PR instead.' >&2; exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qE 'git commit.*(-n\b|--no-verify)'; then echo '[Hook] BLOCKED: Never skip commit hooks with --no-verify or -n. Fix the underlying issue.' >&2; exit 1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qE 'git commit' && git diff --cached 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'console\.log'; then echo '[Hook] BLOCKED: console.log found in staged files. Remove it before committing.' >&2; exit 1; fi
hooks.description: Block git commit if console.log is staged

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qE '(npm install|npm add|yarn add|yarn install)'; then echo '[Hook] BLOCKED: Use pnpm, not npm or yarn. Run: pnpm install or pnpm add <pkg>' >&2; exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.ts$' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(spec|test)\.ts$'; then npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>&1 | head -20 || true; fi
hooks.description: Run type check after editing TypeScript source files

hooks.command: if git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then git diff --cached 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'console\.log' && echo '[Hook] WARNING: Staged files still contain console.log. Clean up before final commit.' >&2 || true; fi
hooks.description: Final session warning if console.log remains staged
